sys_ui_page.description:
UI Page to prompt from Platform about rejection of approval Tasks and subtasks Confirms and prompts the user to provide a reason to reject approval, triggered by reject ui-action
2.8 | 2022-09-16 | mmcc | STRY0129676 - 2.8 Certifier requested updates - Unsafe Jelly Statements For field HTML, updated any ${expression} to ${HTML:expression} per Certifier Basic test: if ${HTML:expression} failed then style sheet is not loaded and no lines are centered 2.8.0 | 2022-08-14 | raj | STRY0125927 - All Mark Complete modals- Add info message "Marking complete will delete Draft Tasks" 2.8 | 2022-06-27 | raj | STRY0123191 - Warning Modal- Rejecting an Approval Subtask will close all "Approval Dependent Tasks"
sys_ui_page.html:
var styleSheets = []; styleSheets.push("tasker-modal-prompt-UIPages.css"); var linkTags = []; for (var sheet in styleSheets) { var css = new GlideRecord("content_css"); css.addQuery("name", styleSheets[sheet]); css.query(); css.next(); linkTags.push(css.sys_id+".cssdbx?ver="+css.sys_updated_on); } Warning Tasker - You are about to reject an Approval Subtask Tasker - This will also close all {0} Approval Tasks dependent on this task Tasker - You have {0} draft tasks Tasker - This will automatically delete ALL draft subtasks as well Tasker - Approval Parent Tasks are dependent on Approval Subtasks. Approval Next-Task Orders are dependent on Previous-Task Orders Tasker - Are you sure you would like to continue? Tasker - Rejection Reason Tasker - Type your rejection reason here cancel Tasker - Button - Reject Tasker - Rejects the Approval and closes dependent approval task var draftCount = 0; var taskerHelpers = new TaskerHelpers(); draftCount = taskerHelpers.getDraftApprovalDependantsCount(jelly.jvar_taskSysId); var dependantTasksCount = ''; var dependantCount = 0; var taskerHelpers = new TaskerHelpers(); dependantCount = taskerHelpers.getActiveApprovalDependantsCount(jelly.jvar_taskSysId); dependantCount = dependantCount - jelly.jvar_draftCount; messDependantCount = gs.getMessage('Tasker - This will also close all {0} Approval Tasks dependent on this task', [dependantCount.toString()]); var messageDraftTasksCount = ''; messageDraftTasksCount = gs.getMessage('Tasker - You have {0} draft tasks', [jelly.jvar_draftCount.toString()]);

${gs.getMessage('Warning')}!

${gs.getMessage('Tasker - You are about to reject an Approval Subtask')}


${HTML:jvar_messageDependantTasksCount}


${gs.getMessage('Tasker - Approval Parent Tasks are dependent on Approval Subtasks. Approval Next-Task Orders are dependent on Previous-Task Orders')}


${HTML:jvar_messageDraftTasksCount}


${gs.getMessage('Tasker - This will automatically delete ALL draft subtasks as well')}


${gs.getMessage('Tasker - Are you sure you would like to continue?')}




${gs.getMessage('cancel')} ${gs.getMessage('Tasker - Button - Reject')}
sys_ui_page.name: reject_approval_task_prompt
